zh.lifeSummary: 當William FitzRalph de Grimthorpe於大約1165年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾波可林頓時，他的父親Ralph FitzRalph de Grimthorpe67歲，母親Emma of Yorkshire19歲。他於大約1180年與Joan Meinill在英國越可爾格利斯索普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1219年之前在英國越可爾霍坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William FitzRalph de Grimthorpe于大约1165年出生在英国英格兰越可爾波可林頓时，他的父亲Ralph FitzRalph de Grimthorpe67岁，母亲Emma of Yorkshire19岁。他于大约1180年与Joan Meinill在英国越可爾格利斯索普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1219年之前在英国越可爾霍坦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When William FitzRalph de Grimthorpe was born about 1165, in Pocklington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph FitzRalph de Grimthorpe, was 67 and his mother, Emma of Yorkshire, was 19. He married Joan Meinill about 1180, in Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died before 1219, in Hotham, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William FitzRalph de Grimthorpe est né environ 1165, à Pocklington, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph FitzRalph de Grimthorpe, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Emma of Yorkshire, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Joan Meinill environ 1180, à Grimesthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 1219, à Hotham, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William FitzRalph de Grimthorpe um 1165 in Pocklington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph FitzRalph de Grimthorpe 67 und seine Mutter Emma of Yorkshire 19. Er hat um 1180 in Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England Joan Meinill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1219 in Hotham, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzRalph de Grimthorpe è nato il circa 1165 nel Pocklington, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph FitzRalph de Grimthorpe, aveva 67 anni e il suo madre, Emma of Yorkshire, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Joan Meinill circa 1180, nel Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1219, nel Hotham, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William FitzRalph de Grimthorpeが約1165年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアポックリントンで生まれた時，父Ralph FitzRalph de Grimthorpeは67歳，母Emma of Yorkshireは19歳であった。約1180年にイギリスヨークシュアイアグリメスソルペでJoan Meinillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1219年以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアホーサムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William FitzRalph de Grimthorpe(이)가 대략 1165년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 포클링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph FitzRalph de Grimthorpe(은)는 67세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma of Yorkshire(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1180년 영국 요르크실르 그라임스소에서 Joan Meinill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1219년 이전 영국 요르크실르 호섬에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzRalph de Grimthorpe nasceu aproximadamente 1165, em Pocklington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph FitzRalph de Grimthorpe, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Emma of Yorkshire, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Meinill aproximadamente 1180, em Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 1219, em Hotham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William FitzRalph de Grimthorpe родился около 1165 г. в местности покклингтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph FitzRalph de Grimthorpe было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma of Yorkshire, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Meinill около 1180 г. в местности гриместаурп, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1219 г. в местности хотам, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William FitzRalph de Grimthorpe nació aproximadamente 1165, en Pocklington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph FitzRalph de Grimthorpe, tenía 67 años y su mamá, Emma of Yorkshire, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Joan Meinill aproximadamente 1180, en Grimesthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 1219, en Hotham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
